en.extract:
The ivory-billed coucal or greater black coucal (Centropus menbeki) is a species of cuckoo in the family Cuculidae. It is found in the Aru Islands and New Guinea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest.

The '''ivory-billed coucal''' or '''greater black coucal''' ('''''Centropus menbeki''''') is a species of [[cuckoo]] in the family [[Cuculidae]]. It is found in the [[Aru Islands]] and [[New Guinea]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]].<ref name="iucn"/>
